sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_data (id UInt32, val Float64, weight Float64) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_data (id, val, weight) VALUES (1, 10.0, 1.0), (2, 20.0, 2.0), (3, 30.0, 3.0);
SELECT quantileInterpolatedWeighted(0.5)(val, weight) AS median_weighted FROM test_data;
UPDATE test_data SET weight = weight + 1 WHERE id = 2;
SELECT quantileInterpolatedWeighted(0.75)(val, weight) AS upper_quartile_weighted FROM test_data;
